prophecies.q: 《End of Days》关于全球疫情的预言
prophecies.a: 大约在2020年，一种严重的类肺炎疾病将在全球蔓延，攻击肺部和支气管，抵抗所有已知的治疗方法。比这种疾病本身更令人困惑的是，它会像来时一样突然消失，十年后再次来袭，然后彻底消失。
prophecies.q_en: 'End of Days' prediction about a global pandemic
prophecies.a_en: In around 2020 a severe pneumonia-like illness will spread throughout the globe, attacking the lungs and the bronchial tubes and resisting all known treatments. Almost more baffling than the illness itself will be the fact that it will suddenly vanish as quickly as it arrived, attack again ten years later, and then disappear completely.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年初，新冠病毒（COVID-19）全球大流行，症状包括攻击肺部和支气管，初期确实抵抗已知治疗方法。该预言因时间和症状描述的高度吻合在社交媒体上广泛传播。后半段关于疫情突然消失和十年后再来的预测尚待观察。
prophecies.verdict_en: In early 2020, COVID-19 spread globally with symptoms attacking the lungs and bronchial tubes, initially resisting known treatments. This prediction went viral on social media due to the remarkably close match in timing and symptoms. The second part about the illness vanishing suddenly and returning ten years later remains to be seen.

prophecies.q: 在《蒙特尔·威廉斯秀》上预测阿曼达·贝里的命运
prophecies.a: 她已经不在人世了……我能感觉到她已经在水边被带走了。
prophecies.q_en: Predicted Amanda Berry's fate on The Montel Williams Show
prophecies.a_en: She's not alive... I can feel that she was taken near water and has passed on.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2004年布朗在电视上告诉阿曼达·贝里的母亲洛韦纳·贝里，她的女儿已经死了。洛韦纳于2006年去世，至死相信女儿已亡。然而2013年5月6日，阿曼达·贝里从绑架者阿里埃尔·卡斯特罗的房子中成功逃脱，被发现活着。这是布朗最臭名昭著的错误预言之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2004, Browne told Amanda Berry's mother Louwana Miller on TV that her daughter was dead. Miller died in 2006 believing her daughter was gone. However, on May 6, 2013, Amanda Berry escaped from her captor Ariel Castro's house and was found alive. This is one of Browne's most infamous wrong predictions.

prophecies.q: 在《蒙特尔·威廉斯秀》上预测肖恩·霍恩贝克的命运
prophecies.a: 他已经不在人世了。他死了，他的尸体在西南方向的树林地区附近。
prophecies.q_en: Predicted Shawn Hornbeck's fate on The Montel Williams Show
prophecies.a_en: He is no longer alive. He's dead, and his body is in a wooded area near the southwest.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 布朗在节目中断言2002年失踪的11岁男孩肖恩·霍恩贝克已死亡。然而2007年1月12日，警方在搜寻另一名失踪男孩本·奥恩比时，在密苏里州柯克伍德发现肖恩仍然活着，他已被绑架者迈克尔·德夫林囚禁了4年多。
prophecies.verdict_en: Browne declared on the show that 11-year-old Shawn Hornbeck, missing since 2002, was dead. However, on January 12, 2007, while searching for another missing boy Ben Ownby, police found Shawn alive in Kirkwood, Missouri, where he had been held captive by kidnapper Michael Devlin for over 4 years.

prophecies.q: 预测6岁失踪女孩奥帕尔·乔·詹宁斯的下落
prophecies.a: 她被卖给了一个在日本的白人奴隶贩子，现在仍然活着。
prophecies.q_en: Predicted the whereabouts of missing 6-year-old Opal Jo Jennings
prophecies.a_en: She was sold to a white slavery ring in Japan and is still alive.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1999年3月，6岁的奥帕尔·乔·詹宁斯在德克萨斯州失踪。布朗告诉其祖母女孩仍然活着并在日本。然而2003年，理查德·弗兰克斯被判犯有绑架和谋杀罪。法医证据显示奥帕尔在失踪当天就已遇害。
prophecies.verdict_en: In March 1999, 6-year-old Opal Jo Jennings went missing in Texas. Browne told her grandmother the girl was alive and in Japan. However, in 2003, Richard Franks was convicted of kidnapping and murder. Forensic evidence showed Opal was killed on the day she disappeared.

prophecies.q: 《End of Days》关于汽车技术的预言
prophecies.a: 到2020年左右，汽油驱动的汽车将成为过去式。汽车将由电力或氢燃料驱动。
prophecies.q_en: 'End of Days' prediction about automotive technology
prophecies.a_en: By around 2020, gas-powered cars will be a thing of the past. Cars will be powered by electricity or hydrogen fuel.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，电动汽车确实快速增长，2024年全球电动车销量占新车总销量约18%。然而汽油车远未成为「过去式」，全球在用车辆中绝大多数仍为燃油车。方向基本正确，但时间线大幅提前。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, electric vehicles have indeed grown rapidly, accounting for about 18% of global new car sales in 2024. However, gas-powered cars are far from being 'a thing of the past' — the vast majority of vehicles on the road are still gasoline-powered. The direction is roughly correct, but the timeline was significantly premature.

prophecies.q: 《End of Days》关于宗教衰落的预言
prophecies.a: 到2050年左右，有组织的宗教将基本消亡。灵性将繁荣发展，但人们将抛弃教条和制度化信仰。
prophecies.q_en: 'End of Days' prediction about the decline of religion
prophecies.a_en: By around 2050, organized religion will have largely died out. Spirituality will thrive, but people will abandon dogma and institutionalized belief systems.

prophecies.q: 《End of Days》关于太空旅行的预言
prophecies.a: 到2025年前后，太空旅行将变得司空见惯。普通人将能够购票进行亚轨道飞行。
prophecies.q_en: 'End of Days' prediction about space travel
prophecies.a_en: By around 2025, space travel will become commonplace. Ordinary people will be able to buy tickets for suborbital flights.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，维珍银河和蓝色起源已实现亚轨道商业载人飞行，SpaceX也完成了商业轨道飞行任务。但「司空见惯」和「普通人」的门槛仍未实现——一张亚轨道船票售价仍在25-45万美元，远非大众可及。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, Virgin Galactic and Blue Origin have achieved suborbital commercial flights, and SpaceX has completed commercial orbital missions. However, 'commonplace' and 'ordinary people' thresholds remain unmet — a suborbital ticket still costs $250,000-$450,000, far from accessible to the general public.

prophecies.q: 《End of Days》关于气候灾难的预言
prophecies.a: 2029年前后将发生一场大规模的水灾，淹没纽约市的大部分低洼地区。
prophecies.q_en: 'End of Days' prediction about climate disaster
prophecies.a_en: Around 2029, a massive flooding event will submerge much of New York City's low-lying areas.

prophecies.q: 预测矿工被困事件结局
prophecies.a: 被困在萨戈矿井的矿工都还活着，他们会被救出来的。
prophecies.q_en: Predicted the outcome of the Sago Mine disaster
prophecies.a_en: The miners trapped in the Sago Mine are all alive, and they will be rescued.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2006年1月2日西弗吉尼亚州萨戈矿井发生爆炸，13名矿工被困。布朗在1月4日的节目中声称矿工们都活着。实际上，13人中12人已死亡，仅兰德尔·麦克洛伊一人幸存。
prophecies.verdict_en: On January 2, 2006, an explosion trapped 13 miners in the Sago Mine in West Virginia. Browne claimed on her January 4 show that the miners were all alive. In reality, 12 of the 13 had died; only Randal McCloy survived.

prophecies.q: 对霍莉·克拉多克案的预测
prophecies.a: 这个女孩还活着，她在佛罗里达州的奥兰多地区。
prophecies.a_en: The girl is still alive, she's in the Orlando, Florida area.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 布朗对失踪女孩霍莉·克拉多克（1994年失踪，时年12岁）的预测完全错误。霍莉的遗体于2006年在费城被发现，法医鉴定显示她在失踪后不久即遇害。
prophecies.verdict_en: Browne's prediction about missing girl Holly Krewson (missing since 1994, age 12) was completely wrong. Holly's remains were found in Philadelphia in 2006, and forensic evidence indicated she was killed shortly after her disappearance.

prophecies.q: 《End of Days》关于医学突破的预言
prophecies.a: 到2020年，我们将找到治愈所有形式的癌症的方法。
prophecies.q_en: 'End of Days' prediction about a medical breakthrough
prophecies.a_en: By 2020, we will have found a cure for all forms of cancer.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年，癌症治疗取得了重大进展（如CAR-T细胞疗法、免疫检查点抑制剂、mRNA疫苗技术等），部分癌症的生存率显著提高，但远未实现「治愈所有形式的癌症」。癌症仍是全球第二大死因。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2026, significant advances have been made in cancer treatment (CAR-T cell therapy, immune checkpoint inhibitors, mRNA vaccine technology, etc.), with survival rates improving for some cancers. However, we are far from 'curing all forms of cancer.' Cancer remains the second leading cause of death globally.

prophecies.q: 在《蒙特尔·威廉斯秀》上预测泰瑞·史密斯案
prophecies.a: 我不认为她还活着，我觉得是和她认识的人干的。
prophecies.q_en: Predicted Terri Smith case on The Montel Williams Show
prophecies.a_en: I don't think she's alive, I think it was someone she knew who did it.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 布朗预测失踪者泰瑞·史密斯已死且凶手是认识的人。泰瑞确实已遇害这部分正确，但案件细节与布朗所述不完全吻合。该案至今仍有诸多未解之处。
prophecies.verdict_en: Browne predicted that missing person Terri Smith was dead and that it was done by someone she knew. The part about Terri being dead was correct, but other case details did not fully match Browne's claims. The case still has many unresolved aspects.

prophecies.q: 关于来世和灵魂的核心主张
prophecies.a: 我们都有一个灵魂图表——一份在出生前就已制定好的生命蓝图。每个灵魂在投胎之前都已选择了自己将经历的人生课题。
prophecies.q_en: Core claim about the afterlife and souls
prophecies.a_en: We all have a soul chart — a life blueprint that was drawn up before birth. Every soul has chosen the life lessons it will experience before incarnating.

prophecies.q: 《End of Days》关于人工智能的预言
prophecies.a: 到2030年，人工智能将在很多领域超越人类智慧，机器人将承担大部分体力劳动和基础服务工作。
prophecies.q_en: 'End of Days' prediction about artificial intelligence
prophecies.a_en: By 2030, artificial intelligence will surpass human intelligence in many areas, and robots will take over most physical labor and basic service jobs.
